C101.message: We want to expand our truck fleet this quarter and support more export routes to Europe.
That sounds promising. Please confirm your turnover, years in operation, and whether you can provide collateral.
Our turnover is $8M, we have operated for 5 years, and the vehicles can be used as collateral.

C102.message: Our team travels often and we need better card limits for staff purchases.
Please share your annual turnover and how long the business has been operating.

C103.message: We are planning to buy warehouse equipment and new machinery for the next production line.
We can review equipment financing. Please share your annual revenue and years in business.
